title: Bevy Native Backend Workstream
problem: Build a Bevy-native Dear ImGui backend that fits Bevy ECS/render lifecycles and preserves extension ecosystem composition.
gates: cargo nextest run -p dear-implot -p dear-imnodes -p dear-node-editor -p dear-imguizmo
evidence: BEVY-011 target train pinned: repo-ref/bevy tag v0.19.0-rc.2 commit a389b928aee5906928a16a7d4e66cb02c7362901, Bevy 0.19.0-rc.2, Rust 1.95.0, WGPU 29.0.3

continue_policy.notes: BEVY-011/020/030/040/050/060/070/080/090/100/110/120/130/140 are complete. Open a new follow-on workstream for multi-window routing, docking multi-viewport OS windows, cursor/IME polish, wasm/mobile support, a full editor/helper crate, or runtime renderer harnesses.
